claims.summary: PI history, viscosity, pressure source, and porosity should remain separately inspectable.
claims.disposition: verify current regulator types and tests expose these dimensions without collapsing them into fill alone

claims.summary: Mode-packing pressure and viscosity may reveal integral lag or overcorrection over time.
claims.disposition: route a bounded 1000-tick cartography and synthetic impulse replay without live controller mutation

claims.summary: Porosity could scale inversely with viscosity to protect settled habitability.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Tier 5 live pressure/porosity/controller intervention requiring operator approval
